must_do.full_text:
Codex has been eating your SSD

For weeks. Through a logger nobody opted into.

The bug: TRACE-level SQLite writes hammering ~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite around the clock. One dev measured 37 TB written in 21 days.

Annualized - 640 TB/year.

A typical 1 TB SSD is rated for 600 TBW. https://t.co/0kyT6ItJKI
must_do.summary: Codex应用存在严重bug，SQLite日志无限写入导致SSD损伤，单个用户21天写入37TB，年化640TB。
angles: Codex暗坑：一个日志bug毁掉你的SSD
37TB写入21天，这个AI工具在偷偷杀死你的硬盘
年化640TB损伤，Codex的隐形成本有多高

must_do.full_text:
Wall Street: Cheap Chinese models kill NVIDIA.

Kimi 48 hours later: Subscriptions paused. GPUs maxed. Adding capacity as fast as possible.

That’s Jevons Paradox with a CUDA bill.

Cheaper intelligence doesn’t reduce compute demand. It detonates it. https://t.co/WCjbShBZPB
must_do.summary: Kimi模型因需求爆增暂停订阅、GPU满载，体现廉价AI引发计算需求激增的杰文斯悖论现象。
angles: 廉价AI引爆计算需求：Kimi暂停订阅背后的杰文斯悖论

must_do.full_text:
Kimi K3 is running 100% FASTER than it was this morning.

Why? Moonshot hit capacity and chose to stop selling NEW subscriptions instead of throttling existing ones. Every plan: sold out. On purpose.

When Anthropic hit the same wall in April, they cut existing users' usage 50% https://t.co/Cepfu2uWdy
must_do.summary: Kimi K3速度提升100%，Moonshot因容量满载停止新订阅销售而非降速。对比Anthropic四月的做法（砍用户50%额度），展现不同商业策略。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：Moonshot选择停售而非降速，与Anthropic对比
"终于"型选题：容量满载的真实案例
angles: Moonshot vs Anthropic：两家AI公司面对容量危机的截然不同选择
Kimi K3突然快100%背后：停售新用户而非砍老用户的商业逻辑
